pricing: pufETH/ETH via Redstone MergedAdapterWithRounds feed, WETH treated as identity.
notes: Immutable MorphoChainlinkOracleV2 wrapper with a single Redstone pufETH/ETH feed (dataFeedId: pufETH/ETH) on the base side and no feeds on the quote side. The Redstone adapter is an upgradeable TransparentUpgradeableProxy — admin can swap the implementation. Feeds are push-based and currently updated roughly daily (~13h ago); if Redstone relayers stop posting, the feed goes stale with no backup. The pufETH rate is also directly verifiable on-chain via the vault's convertToAssets(). Single feed, no redundancy.
